content:
# Petroleum Engineering

**Summary**: The application of engineering principles to the extraction and processing of petroleum.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] addressed petroleum-engineering challenges in unconventional reservoir development.

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] applied petroleum engineering principles to develop a sustainable fluid for well stimulation.

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] applied petroleum engineering principles to develop a real-time advisory model

- [[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023]] applied petroleum-engineering principles to optimize drilling operations through better pressure prediction.

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] conducted research in petroleum engineering regarding thermochemical fluids for fracture cleanup.

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] Referenced in this thesis.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] ['hydraulic-fracturing', 'microseismic-monitoring']

- [[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021]] applied petroleum engineering principles to develop a sustainable fluid for well stimulation.

- [[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021]] applied petroleum engineering principles to develop a real-time advisory model

- [[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023]] applied petroleum-engineering principles to optimize drilling operations through better pressure prediction.

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] conducted research in petroleum engineering regarding thermochemical fluids for fracture cleanup.

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] Referenced in this thesis.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] ['hypo3d', 'ray-tracing']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Microseismic monitoring is a key tool for evaluating hydraulic fracturing success. ([[2015-own|Own, 2015, p. 43]])

- Well stimulation is used to enhance productivity in tight formations, often requiring large amounts of water. ([[2021-alkhowaildi|Alkhowaildi, 2021, p. 15]])

- This system is the first deployment of its kind in unconventional resources that is able to improve hole cleaning efficiency in real-time. ([[2021-al-malki|Al-Malki, 2021, p. 14]])

- Real-time detection of downhole abnormalities is critical for safe well construction. ([[2023-alzayer|Alzayer, 2023, p. 34]])

- The study focused on TCFs as a potential mechanism for breaking fracturing fluid polymers. ([[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024, p. 13]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] Accurate monitoring of fracture growth in complex lithologies.
